summary: Refactor `tesla auth login` to branch on flags: default = PKCE browser flow, --paste = stdin token, --refresh-token = direct exchange, --via tesla-auth = subprocess. Flags are mutually exclusive.
reason: Different users have different constraints (interactive vs headless vs scripted); a single command with mode flags keeps the surface clean. Hand-edits to tesla_auth_refresh.go (which is itself a hand-coded file, classified VerdictNovel by regen-merge).
